missions.description: Each trick you win must have a higher winning card value than your previous won trick
Win a trick where every player plays a different color
Win exactly 4 tricks, each won with a different color card (one per color, no submarines)
Win more cards with prime number values (2,3,5,7) than composite number values (4,6,8,9)
Never win two cards of the same value in different tricks
Win a 9 and a 1 (any color)
Win a trick where all cards form an arithmetic sequence (e.g., 2,4,6 or 1,3,5,7)
Win 4 consecutive numbered cards of the same color (e.g., Blue 3, 4, 5, 6)
Win exactly half the tricks (rounded down): 6/5/4 tricks for 3/4/5 players
Win the trick that contains the last card played of each color (4 specific tricks)
Win a trick by playing a submarine, but not in the first or last trick
Win more pink cards than any other single color
Your winning card values must alternate: above 5, then 5 or below, repeating (at least 3 tricks)
Among your won cards, have exactly one from each color suit whose values sum to 20
Never lead (play first) in any trick (the captain can't take this mission)
Win cards with values that include at least 4 consecutive Fibonacci numbers (e.g., 1,2,3,5 or 2,3,5,8)
Win the middle trick of the game (trick 7/5/4 for 3/4/5 players)
Win a trick where all cards are different colors (no submarines). Needs 3/4/4 different colors for 3/4/5 players
Win all your tricks with the same color as the lead card (at least 2 tricks)
Win a trick where the total card value equals the trick number (e.g., trick 5 totals exactly 5)
Win tricks whose lead card colors follow alphabetical order: Blue, Green, Pink, Yellow (at least 4 tricks)
Win the same number of odd-valued (1,3,5,7,9) and even-valued (2,4,6,8) cards (at least 2 of each)
Win the first trick with a card valued 7 or higher, and the last trick with a card valued 3 or lower
Win cards that include 3 consecutive numbers in the same color (e.g., Green 4, 5, 6)
The captain declares a color at the start. Win every trick where you play a card of that color
Win a trick where all cards are the same color (no submarines)
Win no odd-numbered tricks (1st, 3rd, 5th, etc.) but win at least one even-numbered trick
Win at least one trick in the first half and at least one trick in the second half of the game
Win a trick that contains two cards of the same value (a pair)
Win the 9 of at least 3 different colors
Don't win any trick where the lead card is pink
Win a trick with a total card value of exactly 15
Win more tricks in the second half of the game than the first half
Win every trick that contains a 9 (any color)
Win a trick by leading with a 1 (no submarines allowed in the trick)
